title: Honeymoon
overview: Australian famer Kit Kelly and his new bride Anna are driving through Europe when they help a stranded motorist. They discover he is Antonio, a famous dancer. Upon learning that Anna was a ballerina before she married, Antonio attempts to persuade her to join his company.

trailers.title: "Luna de miel" (Michael Powell, 1959). Localizaciones en Granada.
